hr_reg_klik_foto: Click circle to take/retake face photo
liveness_instruksi:
Face must be inside the circle.
Ensure bright lighting.
aws_liveness_face_unclear: Face not clear enough. Try again with better lighting.
aws_liveness_need_local_face: AWS liveness OK. Capture face for local matching.
aws_liveness_web_unsupported: AWS Face Liveness is only available on mobile.
aws_liveness_camera_denied: Camera permission is required for Face Liveness.
absensi_syarat_aws:
Attendance requirements:
1. Device inside store GPS radius
2. Clock-in: scan QR on Admin store screen
3. AWS Face Liveness (anti-spoof)
4. Face matches enrolled template (local)
Clock-out: no Admin QR required
absensi_syarat_local:
Attendance requirements:
1. Device inside store GPS radius
2. Clock-in: scan QR on Admin store screen
3. Liveness (smile)
4. Face matches enrolled template (local)
Clock-out: no Admin QR required
dash_absen_flow_hint: Branch: show Attendance QR → staff scan on phone (GPS in store) → face match on Admin. Monitor (admin pusat/owner): store list → staff clocked in today → Valid/Suspicious. Pusat attendance is reviewed by owner only.
absensi_toko_hint: Store device mode ({toko}). Show QR, wait for staff scan. Clock-in: face match here. Clock-out: automatic without face.
absensi_toko_qr_first_banner: Show this QR. Staff scans in the app (phone GPS must be inside the store). Not clocked in → face match on Admin. Open shift → auto clock-out without face. GPS is not from Mac/PC.
absensi_toko_waiting_scan: Waiting for staff to scan the Attendance QR on their phone… (location from phone GPS, not Admin PC)
absensi_toko_lokasi_ok_auto: Location OK (staff QR scan). Continuing to face match for clock-in…
absensi_toko_pulang_auto_running: Recording clock-out for {nama} (QR + location, no face)…
absensi_toko_akan_masuk: Will clock in after face match.
absensi_toko_akan_pulang: Clock-out is automatic after QR scan + GPS inside the store (no face).
absensi_toko_enroll_now_hint: Face not enrolled yet. Enroll on Admin now, then ask staff to scan QR again to clock.
absensi_toko_unlock_no_gps: Location unlock has no GPS coordinates. Ask staff to scan again inside the store area.
absensi_toko_no_toko: Admin store is not set. Cannot open Store Attendance.
absensi_toko_web_blocked: Face match needs Admin Android on a store tablet (not the web browser). Build: scripts/release_admin_apk.sh
absensi_toko_web_hint: Web mode: browser camera challenge + attendance photo. Valid/Suspicious is decided in Attendance Monitor. Allow camera. Staff need an enrolled face photo for review comparison.
absensi_toko_web_no_gps_banner: Mac/PC has no GPS. Location proof comes from staff QR scan + phone GPS — not from the Admin computer.
absensi_toko_need_photo_reenroll: No reference face photo yet. Re-enroll so Attendance Monitor can compare clock-in vs enrolled photo.
web_liveness_disclaimer: Verifying face for attendance. Final decision is via Admin review.
web_liveness_step_position: Place your face in the oval, then continue.
web_liveness_step_still: Look straight & hold still, then capture.
web_liveness_verify_hint: Attendance photo is ready for Admin Monitor review.
web_liveness_wait: Stay on this step a moment longer.
web_liveness_need_turn: Head turn not detected. Turn a bit more and try again.
web_liveness_need_still: Still moving. Hold still, then capture.
web_liveness_face_unclear: Face/photo unclear. Use better lighting and keep face in the oval.
web_liveness_frame_bad: Failed to capture a camera frame. Try again.
web_liveness_no_camera: No camera found on this device.
web_liveness_camera_denied: Camera permission denied. Allow camera in the browser for Store Attendance.
absensi_toko_wrong_toko: Staff store is {karyawan}, device store is {perangkat}.
absensi_toko_need_enroll: Face not enrolled yet. Enroll face first (here or in the staff app).
absensi_toko_qr_note: Admin QR remains available as a fallback under Store Attendance QR.
absensi_toko_geo_fail_hint: Keep the Admin device inside the drawn 4-corner area. Compare the coordinates above with the Geofence map pin.
absensi_toko_geo_fail_hint_web: Mac/PC typically has no built-in GPS chip — browser Wi‑Fi/IP location is unreliable for a small store geofence. Web Store Attendance does not use GPS; it relies on the selected store + face verification. For strict GPS, use the Admin APK on a phone/tablet at the store.
absensi_toko_cek_lokasi_ok: Location is inside the store area
absensi_hp_pakai_perangkat_toko: Clock-in: face match on Admin. Clock-out: QR scan only (GPS must be inside). On this phone: scan Attendance QR for location proof.
absensi_hp_syarat_kiosk:
On personal phone:
1. Enroll face (once, optional here)
2. Scan Attendance QR on Admin screen (GPS must be inside store)
3. Not clocked in → face match on Admin for clock-in
4. After clock-in, phone location is monitored
5. Clock-out: scan QR again inside the store (no face match)
absensi_hp_kiosk_banner: Scan QR + GPS inside store. Not clocked in → continue face on Admin. Open shift → clock-out recorded automatically (no face).
absensi_hp_lokasi_ok_ke_admin: Location OK. Continue face match on Admin to clock in.
absensi_hp_lokasi_ok_pulang: Location OK. Clock-out is being recorded on Admin (no face)…
absensi_hp_geo_outside: QR alone is not enough. Your phone GPS is outside the store area. Enter the store area and scan again.
absensi_hp_geo_outside_detail: Scan rejected: GPS outside store area (even if QR is valid). {detail}
absensi_hp_monitor_started: Clock-in detected. Phone location is monitored during the shift (except with approved leave).
absensi_hp_monitor_active_note: Shift open: keep the “Absensi aktif · lokasi dipantau” notification visible. Allow Always location, notifications, and (Android) disable battery optimization for this app so monitoring continues with the screen off. Force-stop or revoking permission still stops monitoring — it is not unkillable.
attendance_qr_hint: Show at store {toko}. Staff scan on phone (GPS inside store). Not clocked in → face match on Admin. Open shift → auto clock-out without face. Code rotates every ~{detik}s.
attendance_qr_no_toko: Admin store is not set. Cannot show QR.
attendance_qr_scan_hint: Point the camera at the Attendance QR on your store Admin screen.
attendance_qr_ok: Attendance QR valid. Checking GPS location…
attendance_qr_wrong_toko: QR is for store {qr}, your account is {akun}.
bantuan_desc: Find answers to store operational issues below.
bantuan_ql: What if the store internet is down when trying to clock in/out?
bantuan_al: Temporarily use personal mobile data to click clock in/out. Ensure your GPS (Location) is on and you are in the store area.
bantuan_q2: How to claim customer glasses warranty?
bantuan_a2: Ensure the customer brings the original invoice or WA proof. Check if the damage is reasonable (not due to intentional negligence like breaking/dropping). Report to the Store Manager before providing compensation.
bantuan_q3: The POS cashier app on the tablet suddenly closed (Force Close)?
bantuan_a3: Force close the app from Recent Apps, then reopen. If it still happens, try restarting the cashier tablet. Ensure a stable internet connection.
bantuan_q4: Certain minus lens stock is empty in the store?
bantuan_a4: Use the Complaints page or the 'Request Stock' feature in the POS to request lens delivery from the Head Office warehouse ASAP.
bantuan_msg_wa: Redirecting to Head Office Admin WhatsApp...
appr_absen_desc:
Ensure face is inside the frame
and room lighting is sufficient.
appr_desc_setuju: Are you sure you want to approve the account {}? This employee will be immediately active for work.

universal_qr_scan_hint: Point the camera at an invoice, attendance, or delivery QR.
universal_qr_need_attendance: Clock-in requires the Admin Attendance QR (not an invoice QR).
universal_qr_attendance_admin: This is an Attendance QR. Staff scan it in the Employee app when clocking in.
universal_qr_attendance_member: This is a staff Attendance QR. Clock-in is only in the Employee app.
universal_qr_receive_staff_only: Stock receive QR is only for staff at the destination store.
universal_qr_receive_not_member: Stock receive QR is for store staff only, not Member.
universal_qr_receive_no_cabang: Employee branch is not set. Cannot process receive.
member_scan_qr_sub: Scan an invoice QR for rating, or another recognized QR
invoice_hub_not_invoice: This QR is not an Optik B. Riski invoice
invoice_hub_belum_lunas: Unpaid — pickup locked until fully paid.
invoice_hub_staff_note: The same QR for customers shows status & warranty. Staff ratings come in the next phase.
invoice_hub_customer_info: Your order summary. Store reviews go to Google. Rate the cashier & glasses maker only in the Member app (not via the invoice QR).
invoice_hub_google_missing: Google Review link is not set for this branch (Invoice Config / invoice_settings.google_review_url).
invoice_hub_rating_via_member: Want to rate staff? Open the Member app → Staff rating, then scan the invoice QR.
member_home_desc: Points, promos, and ratings for the staff who served you.
member_rating_tile_sub: Rate POS cashier & glasses maker from your invoice
member_rating_desc: Type the invoice number, or use Scan QR on the home screen. Rating opens after pickup. Employees cannot rate themselves.
invoice_hub_pembuat_empty: Not set — required before the customer can rate
invoice_hub_no_karyawan: No active employees at this branch
invoice_hub_rating_locked: Rating opens after glasses are picked up in store.
invoice_hub_rating_privacy: Ratings are only from the customer’s phone (no staff login). Logged-in employees/admins cannot rate themselves.
invoice_hub_rating_wait_assign: Waiting for the store to assign this role.
garansi_ringkasan_desc: HQ monitoring — 7-day warranty from pickup; 1 claim/sale; decisions at branch.
garansi_pusat_note: HQ can see all branches. Claims are processed by branch admins.
garansi_riwayat_kosong: No claims on this card yet
garansi_pusat_readonly: HQ mode: view only. Claim decisions are made at the branch.
garansi_rules_short: Warranty runs 7 days from pickup scan + finish photo. 1 claim per sale. Failed features (anti-scratch scratches, bluechromic not changing, elastic frame breaks) → replace with same specs. Ordinary negligence rejected. Lens Rx recheck must differ from original.
garansi_ambil_desc: Scan the online receipt barcode. A finish photo is required as proof of good condition. Warranty then starts for 7 days.
export_page_desc: Select domains and a date range, then download a premium PDF report (merged or split per domain).
export_pdf_note: PDF for viewing & printing — consistent layout, Optik B. Riski branding, and not casually editable.
export_pdf_helper: Best for archive, review, and print. Empty domains appear in the summary only. Each download gets an automatic copy number.
export_jakarta_note: Dates are shown in Jakarta time
export_no_domain: Select at least one domain to export.
export_pusat_only: PDF export is available for HQ Admin only.
export_mode_gabung_hint: All selected domains in a single file.
export_mode_pisah_hint: One PDF per domain; same cover & copy number.
export_mode_single_hint: One domain = one PDF (merge/split does not apply).
export_salinan_hint: Increments on every successful download. Not editable.
export_salinan_hint_missing: DB counter not ready — preview unavailable. Export can still use a local fallback number.
export_salinan_rpc_missing: Copy counter is not ready in the database. Run the export_download_history SQL migration.
export_salinan_local_warn: PDF used a local copy number (DB counter missing). Run the migration to sync numbers.
export_infra_banner: History/copy counter is not ready in the database. Run the export_download_history SQL migration in Supabase → SQL Editor.
export_history_migration: Run the export_download_history SQL migration in Supabase so download history can be saved.
export_done_ok: PDF report ready (Copy #{n}). Share or open the file.
export_done_ok_multi: PDF report ready (Copy #{n}) — {count} files. Share or open all.
export_done_partial: Report finished with some errors (see summary).
export_history_warn: PDF succeeded, but download history failed to save. Check connection / SQL migration.
leave_msg_edits: Save first, or discard changes before leaving.
leave_msg_view: You will leave the current page.
leave_msg_pos: Choose how to leave the open transaction.
leave_to_run_qr_title: Run this QR outside this page?
leave_to_run_qr_msg: This QR opens another feature. Leave this page now?
leave_to_run_qr_confirm_sub: Leave this page and open the QR target
leave_save_then_run_qr_sub: Save changes, then open the QR target
pos_leave_discard_draft_sub: Clear transaction, scan cashier QR again
pos_discard_sure_msg: Nothing will be saved. You must scan the cashier QR again from the start.
pos_save_leave_sure_msg: Your draft will be saved, then you leave Cashier Terminal.
leave_save_sure_msg: Please confirm before leaving so you don’t tap by mistake.
training_banner_subtitle: Sandbox curriculum — not production; exit wipes all
training_enter_lead: Full operational practice in a local environment — feels like live, with zero risk to production data.
training_enter_safe_note: Modules sync inside the sandbox only. Nothing is sent or saved to the live system.
training_enter_wipe_note: On exit, all training data is permanently wiped. Re-enter starts from zero.
training_enter_body:
Training Mode opens only 6 operational modules:
• POS Cashier
• Logistics
• History & Down Payment
• Frame/Lens Warranty
• Finance & Cash
• Master Data

Modules sync with each other inside the local sandbox (e.g. a POS sale appears in History & Finance). Nothing leaks to production.

On exit, ALL training data is wiped. Re-enter starts from zero.
training_exit_body: All training data on this device will be permanently deleted. Entering Training Mode again starts fresh (new seed catalog).
training_menu_enter_desc: POS, Logistics, History, Warranty, Finance, Master Data — local sandbox
training_menu_exit_desc: Wipe all training data and return to live
training_msg_entered: Training Mode on. 6 curriculum modules ready — local only, not production.
training_msg_exited: Training ended. Local training data wiped. Back to live.
training_pos_unlock_missing: Training cashier missing in sandbox. Exit and re-enter Training Mode.
training_pos_absensi_blocked: Attendance is not part of the Training Mode curriculum.
training_err_no_profile: Employee profile not found. Cannot enter Training Mode.
training_err_no_admin_profile: Admin profile incomplete (store/role). Cannot enter Training Mode.
training_block_account_change: Password/PIN/face changes are unavailable in Training Mode (protects live data).
training_pengaduan_local_ok: Complaint saved locally (training) — not sent to HQ.
training_approval_sim_body: In live, this request waits for HQ Admin. In Training Mode, you choose the outcome to learn what happens next.
training_approval_sim_body_pengaduan: Complaint is queued (sandbox). Choose the HQ decision to simulate.
training_approval_sim_body_pengajuan: Schedule request is waiting (sandbox). Choose the HQ decision to simulate.
training_approval_sim_body_request_order: Request Order is queued for HQ (sandbox, no sync). Choose the HQ decision to simulate.
training_approval_sim_body_coa: Finance journal awaits owner/HQ confirmation (sandbox). Choose the decision to simulate.
training_approval_sim_body_stock_move: Return shipment awaits HQ validation (sandbox). Choose the decision to simulate.
training_ro_outcome_pending: Simulation: RO still waiting for HQ approval (SENT_TO_HQ, sandbox).
training_coa_outcome_pending: Simulation: journal still awaiting confirmation (PENDING, sandbox).
training_stock_move_outcome_approved: Simulation: return ACCEPTED by HQ (SUCCESS, sandbox).
training_stock_move_outcome_pending: Simulation: return still awaiting validation (PENDING, sandbox).
training_export_stub_done: Training Mode: export simulated (not a real file, not production).
training_export_stub_summary: Training export — non-real stub; production data unchanged.
training_attendance_stub_note: Training Mode: attendance QR is a local simulation — not synced to live attendance.
training_approval_sim_approve_desc: Simulate HQ approval — see approved status.
training_approval_sim_reject_desc: Simulate HQ rejection — see rejected status.
training_approval_sim_pending_desc: Keep waiting status — learn the queue screen.
training_pengaduan_outcome_approved_body: In live, HQ marks the report DONE. No further employee action unless follow-up is requested.
training_pengaduan_outcome_rejected_body: In live, HQ may reject/close the report. You see rejected status and can resubmit if needed.
HQ rejected with note: "{}". In live, this note helps you fix the report.
training_pengaduan_outcome_pending_body: Report stays OPEN/pending. In live, HQ has not processed it yet — no decision notification until then.
training_pengajuan_outcome_approved: Simulation: request APPROVED. Check status in history.
training_pengajuan_outcome_rejected: Simulation: request REJECTED. Check status in history.
training_pengajuan_outcome_pending: Simulation: request still PENDING. Check status in history.
